name: Antavo Enterprise Loyalty Cloud API
what_it_does: Antavo enterprise loyalty cloud REST API for large retailers and brands to build and manage omnichannel loyalty programs with tier management, gamification, rewards catalog, and customer lifecycle automation across online and physical store touchpoints. Enables AI agents to manage loyalty member enrollment and profile for enterprise retention automation, handle tier progression and point accrual for omnichannel loyalty automation, access rewards catalog and redemption for enterprise incentive automation, retrieve gamification rules and badges for engagement automation, manage event-based loyalty triggers for lifecycle automation, handle gift card and voucher management for enterprise redemption automation, access loyalty program analytics and ROI for optimization automation, retrieve customer segment and cohort for loyalty personalization automation, manage store associate and in-store loyalty for omnichannel touchpoint automation, and integrate Antavo with Salesforce, SAP, Magento, and enterprise retail platforms for end-to-end enterprise loyalty automation.
use_cases: Managing enterprise tier progression from omnichannel loyalty agents
Automating gamification rewards from customer engagement agents
Integrating in-store loyalty from omnichannel retail agents
Analyzing loyalty ROI from enterprise retention optimization agents
not_for: SMB simple punch card loyalty (use Smile.io or LoyaltyLion for SMB)
E-commerce-only digital loyalty (Antavo is omnichannel enterprise-focused)
Simple referral programs (use Extole or Mention Me for referral-first)
best_when: An enterprise retailer or global brand wanting AI agents to automate omnichannel loyalty program management, tier progression, and gamification rewards across physical and digital touchpoints through Antavo's enterprise loyalty cloud.
avoid_when: IMPLEMENTATION REQUIRES ANTAVO PROFESSIONAL SERVICES: Antavo enterprise loyalty implementation requires engagement with Antavo PS for program modeling and rule configuration; automated self-service complex loyalty setup requires deep platform knowledge; automated standalone integration without PS engagement creates misconfigured loyalty rules. WORKFLOW ENGINE COMPLEXITY: Antavo uses visual workflow engine for loyalty rule triggers; automated loyalty action must be configured via workflow editor not just API calls; automated API-only integration without workflow configuration creates events processed but no loyalty actions triggered. EVENT SCHEMA STRICT VALIDATION: Antavo loyalty events have strict schema requirements (member ID, event type, attributes); automated event sending must validate against schema; automated malformed event creates silent event rejection without clear error response. MEMBER MUST EXIST BEFORE EVENTS: Antavo loyalty event processing requires member to exist in system; automated purchase event for non-enrolled member creates event processed but no loyalty credit; automated event pipeline must verify member enrollment before sending events.

auth.notes: Antavo uses API key authentication for loyalty cloud access. REST API with JSON. Budapest, Hungary HQ. Founded 2012 by Zsuzsa Kecsmar and Attila Kecsmar. Backed by Manta Ray, Digital Natives ($15M raised). Products: Loyalty tiers, point engine, gamification, rewards catalog, gift cards, omnichannel events, analytics. No public SDK. GDPR. ISO 27001. Serves enterprise global retailers. G2 loyalty platform leader. Competes with Talon.One and Voucherify for enterprise loyalty.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise sales process required
pricing.paid_tiers: Custom enterprise pricing based on active members; typically $30,000-$150,000+/year
pricing.notes: Budapest HU. Manta Ray backed. Annual enterprise contract. Per active member pricing model.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; loyalty event and member APIs throttled; webhooks for tier, points, and redemption events

known_agent_gotchas: WORKFLOW ENGINE SEPARATE FROM API: Antavo loyalty actions (award points, upgrade tier) are triggered by workflow rules configured in UI, not directly via API; automated loyalty system must configure workflows before API events will produce loyalty outcomes; automated API-only integration without workflow setup creates events received but no loyalty actions taken

MEMBER ENROLLMENT PREREQUISITE: Antavo requires member to be enrolled (createMember) before loyalty events are processed; automated event pipeline must check member existence before sending purchase or activity events; automated event for non-enrolled customer creates silent rejection without error

POINT BALANCE EXPIRY CONFIGURATION: Antavo point expiry is configured per program but affects automated redemption logic; automated redemption workflow must account for point expiry dates; automated redemption against expired points creates insufficient balance error

OMNICHANNEL EVENT SOURCE TRACKING: Antavo distinguishes event sources (online, POS, mobile); automated event sending must include correct source attribute; automated event without source creates reporting attribution gap in omnichannel analytics

API DOCUMENTATION GATED BEHIND PORTAL: Antavo developer documentation requires partner portal access; automated self-service integration requires Antavo engagement; automated integration without portal documentation creates undiscoverable endpoint and schema information
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise loyalty. GDPR, ISO 27001. API key. EU/US. Customer loyalty and behavioral data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise loyalty. GDPR, ISO 27001. API key. EU. Customer loyalty and behavioral data.
